0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.kostal-piko-ba/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
